subcodes.first_line: O thou who drinkest the pure wine of mystic knowledge! Be thou steadfast in the Cause of thy Lord, the All-Merciful, in such wise that all things may be shaken thereby [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا ایها الشارب رحیق العرفان ان استقم علی امر ربک الرحمن علی شان یتزعزع به
subcodes.subjects: @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day, @call to action, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @love of God
